The entire scene is monochrome except for a vibrant pop of colour - the red, gold, and green Rastafarian bracelet on his wrist glowing with saturated hues. The composition balances the stark black and white aesthetic with that single, meaningful burst of traditional Jamaican colours representing cultural pride and identity.
